questions.question: Describe the difference between boundary following and chain code representation of a binary image boundary. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the concept, highlighting the main advantages of each method

questions.question: What is the key difference between horizontal and vertical chain codes, and how do they relate to the orientation of the image boundary? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the concept, highlighting the main implications for image processing applications

questions.question: Write a MATLAB code snippet that generates a binary image with a simple closed curve using the 'borders' function and then applies chain code to represent the boundary. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Use the following syntax: `code = chaincode(image);` and include comments to explain the code
